decisionVocabulary.reference_ready: May be used as a cited, single-study literature reference for the named target only.
decisionVocabulary.treatment_reference: May be used as a cited COD-treatment reference when circuit mode and duration are matched.
decisionVocabulary.hold_for_reconciliation: May be displayed as a reported result, but is excluded from similarity matching and pooling until the named issue is resolved.
decisionVocabulary.context_only: May support explanatory material or feature design, but not a numerical calculator output.

decisions.normalizationBasis: Reported values imply 30 cm2, consistent with both faces of a 3 x 5 cm electrode, but the source basis is not explicit.
decisions.resolutionAction: Confirm whether 30 cm2 is the explicitly intended two-face electrode area before enabling power matching.

decisions.normalizationBasis: Approximately consistent with a 30 cm2 two-face area, but the basis is not explicit and central values are rounded.
decisions.loadVoltageContext: Loaded voltage reported at 100 ohm; duplicate batches.
decisions.resolutionAction: Verify the area convention and retain duplicate-batch status in any displayed reference.

decisions.normalizationBasis: Power density implies about 30 cm2, but the reported current density is irreconcilable with voltage and resistance.
decisions.resolutionAction: Recheck the source figure or erratum; never expose the current-density value as a calculator benchmark.

decisions.normalizationBasis: The reported peak is close to a 30 cm2 two-face convention but cannot be tied deterministically to the stated voltage point.
decisions.loadVoltageContext: Polarization maximum; do not combine with steady 100-ohm observations.
decisions.resolutionAction: Digitize or re-read the polarization point with its exact resistance and normalization definition.

decisions.normalizationBasis: Projected cathode area, reported as 18.6 x 10^-4 m2.
decisions.loadVoltageContext: Peak power at 100 ohm; current-density maximum belongs to 5 ohm and is excluded from the same comparison.
decisions.resolutionAction: Keep peak current density separate and display the projected-cathode area basis beside power density.

decisions.normalizationBasis: Projected cathode area, reported as 18.6 x 10^-4 m2.
decisions.loadVoltageContext: Peak power at 100 ohm; current-density maximum belongs to 5 ohm and is excluded from the same comparison.
decisions.resolutionAction: Do not extrapolate the two-condition salinity response beyond 20-40 g/L.

decisions.normalizationBasis: Reported electrode areas are retained, but peak power and current use different load points.
decisions.loadVoltageContext: 100-ohm voltage is not assumed to be the polarization peak.
decisions.resolutionAction: Verify the starch concentration wording and exact peak-power resistance from the source; publish citation and derived facts only.

decisions.normalizationBasis: Reported electrode areas are retained, but peak power and current use different load points.
decisions.loadVoltageContext: 100-ohm voltage is not assumed to be the polarization peak.
decisions.resolutionAction: Use as a cited reported optimum only after source-level concentration and load-point confirmation.

decisions.normalizationBasis: Reported electrode areas are retained, but peak power and current use different load points.
decisions.loadVoltageContext: 100-ohm voltage is not assumed to be the polarization peak.
decisions.resolutionAction: Keep the salinity condition as a private-source reference pending the same reconciliation.

decisions.normalizationBasis: Reported electrode areas are retained, but peak power and current use different load points.
decisions.loadVoltageContext: 100-ohm voltage is not assumed to be the polarization peak.
decisions.resolutionAction: Keep treatment and power optima separate; the highest starch removal is not the highest power condition.

decisions.sourceFile: Public full text; no local PDF
decisions.normalizationBasis: Reported paper basis retained; mediator and modified-electrode system are not comparable to the operating rows.
decisions.loadVoltageContext: 455 mV is open-circuit potential and never a loaded-voltage input.
decisions.resolutionAction: Use only in explanatory material about electrode modification and electron-transfer features.

decisions.sourceFile: Public full text; no local PDF
decisions.normalizationBasis: Bioelectrochemical current density is not directly comparable with the MFC power-density rows.
decisions.loadVoltageContext: No comparable loaded MFC voltage or external resistance.
decisions.resolutionAction: Correct the converted current-density field before any future numerical reuse; retain the paper as feature evidence now.

decisions.targetRole: Wastewater COD under power-producing MFC operation
decisions.normalizationBasis: Not required for COD removal; no power-density value is carried into the calculator.
decisions.resolutionAction: Display raw and background-adjusted interpretations separately and match the 24-hour duration.

decisions.normalizationBasis: Not required for COD removal; this row is never a power benchmark.
decisions.loadVoltageContext: Short circuit; no harvestable external power.
decisions.resolutionAction: Show only when the user explicitly selects short-circuit treatment mode.

decisions.targetRole: Wastewater COD under microbial electrochemical snorkel operation
decisions.normalizationBasis: Not required for COD removal; MES is a treatment configuration, not a power-producing MFC output.
decisions.loadVoltageContext: Internally shorted microbial electrochemical snorkel; no harvestable external power.
decisions.resolutionAction: Keep MES results outside the electricity-calculator recommendation path.

decisions.normalizationBasis: Reported W m-2 kg-1 combines cathode area and treated biomass and cannot be converted safely to conventional mW/m2.
decisions.loadVoltageContext: 1000-ohm operating context; numerical output excluded because normalization is incompatible.
decisions.resolutionAction: Use for future fouling-alert features, not electricity estimation.
